statement: AUDIT-SUPPORT partial outcome for a prospective lock (Phase 16B-R). This is NOT a four-bucket observed distribution, NOT calibration data, and does NOT unlock Phase 15E. The locked prediction was made BEFORE the outcome was known; the outcome here is a buyer/action ANCHOR ONLY. observed remains null on the case; the receptive / uncertain_proof_needed / skeptical_resistant buckets are UNOBSERVED (not invented). This file is never loaded as a validation case (absent from manifest.json).

outcome.further_stretch_goals_note: 10 further stretch goals (up to ~$3.5M) were NOT unlocked.

late_pledge_caveat: BackerKit late pledging continues post-close. These figures are the Kickstarter-CLOSE numbers. The locked score MUST NOT be altered by post-close late pledges — no repo policy permits late-pledge inclusion, so they are recorded here only as a caveat.
directional_verdict_explanation: Locked buyer_action_positive = 0.0 vs an observed paid buyer/action anchor materially above zero (698 backers, $166,070, 166% of the $100k goal, clearing the base goal and the first ~$150k stretch). The lock under-predicted buyer/action demand -> directional buyer-anchor MISS. This is a PARTIAL signal: it scores only the buyer anchor, not the full distribution.
non_buyer_buckets_unobservable: receptive / uncertain_proof_needed / skeptical_resistant cannot be measured from a self-selected pledge funnel (Phase 15L-A/15L-B finding). They are NOT invented; observed stays null; no four-bucket MAE is computed.
does_not_unlock_phase_15e: An action_anchor_only buyer-only outcome is partial; it is NOT a measured direct_observed_distribution and does NOT count toward the >=20 direct-observed Phase 15E bar. Phase 15E remains blocked.
anti_overfit_note: A single scored case can NEVER trigger a model change. GLOBAL_FIX_THRESHOLD=2 requires repeated measured failure patterns across >=2 distinct scored products. Tomo (run_4fcc4cbf...) is the next scoring input, on/after 2026-06-21.
source_precision_note: Press reports '$166K / just under 700 backers / one stretch unlocked'; the precise $166,070 / 698 / 166% are the campaign-close figures. No source conflict. The first stretch goal threshold ($150,000) is confirmed by MMORPG.com.
